hero.title: VAN builds, powers and connects the future.
hero.description: VAN International Group brings together complementary expertise through VAN Petroleum, VAN BTP and VAN Logistics & Transport to offer reliable, structured solutions adapted to the needs of businesses, institutions and territories.

petroleum.title: VAN Petroleum
petroleum.text: Service stations, petroleum product distribution and associated services.

btp.title: VAN BTP
btp.text: Construction of industrial infrastructure and specialized buildings.

logistics.title: VAN Logistics & Transport
logistics.text: Goods transportation and supply chain management.

about.title: A multisectoral group serving Africa
about.subtitle: Over 15 years of expertise in industrial and logistics development
about.description: Founded in 2008, VAN International Group has established itself as a major player in the energy, construction and logistics sectors in Central Africa. Our expertise covers the entire value chain, from supply to final distribution.
about.vision: To be a reference player in energy, construction and logistics.
about.mission: To provide concrete, reliable and sustainable solutions that support economic development.
about.engagement: To put safety, service quality and customer satisfaction at the center of every operation.
